phases.name: run-command-failure-contract
phases.precondition: - `tests/test_git.py` and `src/continuous_refactoring/git.py` match the current checked/unchecked behavior baseline. - No code in `loop.py`/`phases.py` depends on new symbols yet.

phases.name: wrap-missing-command-failures
phases.precondition: - Phase 1 complete and passing. - No API contract changes outside `continuous_refactoring.git`.

phases.name: boundary-smoke-and-docs
phases.precondition: - Phase 2 is complete and `tests/test_git.py` passes. - Working tree is clean and stable for broader validation.
